REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (962 Capitol Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Feb-02-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrea DiTullio for and with Eric Brandon.

The sale was confirmed at $365,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Judge: Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (962 Capitol Ave. S.F.)
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Continued To Jan-31-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrea Ditullio for Eric Brandon.

The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to January 31, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for publication. The Court will allow shortened publication of two times in five days.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Off Calendar Feb-23-2011 Continued To Mar-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cohen specially appearing for Wells Fargo Bank.

Mr. Cohen stated that he will have Wells Fargo file the amended petition and provide notice to the inetersted Parties. The matter was continued to March 23, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the amended petition. If the amended petition is not filed by that date, the current petition will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: S. Hughes, CSR#12365. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
